question: What technologies do you work with?
answer: On the front-end I work with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, combined with Tailwind CSS and SCSS for styling, and GSAP for animations. On the back-end I have experience with Node.js and Nest.js, PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, authentication via Clerk and custom OAuth flows, payment integrations with Stripe, and third-party APIs like Nova Poshta. I also work with CMS platforms — Sanity, Strapi, and WordPress. Additionally I have some Three.js experience for 3D visualizations.

question: What types of projects do you take on?
answer: I take on a wide range of front-end projects — landing pages, e-commerce stores, corporate websites, web applications, and portfolio sites. I also handle full-stack projects using Next.js with CMS integration, and can build sites on WordPress from HTML/CSS layouts.

question: How do you ensure code quality?
answer: I follow SOLID, KISS, and DRY principles in my daily work. All projects are set up with ESLint and Prettier for consistent formatting. I write clean, well-structured TypeScript with proper typing, use component-based architecture, and optimize for performance — including image optimization, lazy loading, and minimizing unnecessary re-renders.

question: Are your projects SEO-friendly and responsive?
answer: Yes, all solutions are modern, adaptive, and SEO-optimized. I use semantic HTML5, proper meta tags, structured data, and follow Core Web Vitals best practices. Every project is fully responsive and tested across different screen sizes and devices.

question: How can I reach you for a project?
answer: You can reach me via email at s.vashkevych@gmail.com, message me on Telegram @serg_v6, or connect on LinkedIn. I'm currently open for new freelance work and collaborations.
